ksa_text: Knowledge of AI system documentation standards including model cards, system cards, datasheets for datasets, and evaluation evidence standards required for regulatory conformity assessment.

dcwf.top_element_label: Ensure that AI design and development activities are properly documented and updated.

nist_ai_rmf.top_element_label: Policies, processes, procedures, and practices across the organization related to the mapping, measuring, and managing of AI risks are in place, transparent, and implemented effectively.

top_anchors.element_label: Policies, processes, procedures, and practices across the organization related to the mapping, measuring, and managing of AI risks are in place, transparent, and implemented effectively.
Ensure that AI design and development activities are properly documented and updated.

pass_2_evaluation.rationale: KSA RM-K-008 (RM, Knowledge) maps to Citizen Data Scientist scope as weak fit. Composite score 0.5375 clears the weak fit threshold of 0.52. Top framework anchors: eu_ai_act=0.538, nist_ai_rmf=0.513, nice=0.424. Seniority fit: appropriate; content reflects IC-to-senior-IC execution work within self-service analytics, business-led data exploration, and low-code BI.

pass_3_adversarial_internal.challenge: weak fit domain KSA RM-K-008 with composite 0.5375 was preliminarily included, but the KSA text contains no direct analytics-domain signals. Internal consistency requires this to be re-examined against ANL scope.
pass_3_adversarial_internal.rebuttal: Composite 0.5375 above the weak_fit threshold of 0.52 but absence of analytics terminology in the RM domain text means the signal is framework-incidental rather than role-specific. Exclusion is more internally consistent with ANL scope definition.
pass_3_adversarial_internal.ruling: P2 include overturned. RM domain KSA with no analytics text signals at composite 0.5375 does not survive internal consistency review. Revised to exclude.

pass_4_adversarial_external.challenge: External validation: does RM-domain KSA RM-K-008 (composite 0.5375) appear in published data analyst or BI role profiles?
pass_4_adversarial_external.evidence: RM domain content (AI governance, security/privacy, risk management, compliance) is not a primary expectation in IC-to-senior-IC ANL roles per COSO ERM framework; risk competencies in IC ANL scope limited to data risk identification, not enterprise risk management. Composite 0.5375 confirms weak signal. Exclusion consistent with published ANL frameworks.
pass_4_adversarial_external.ruling: P3 exclude upheld. External evidence confirms RM domain KSA at composite 0.5375 is not a standard requirement for Citizen Data Scientist at IC-to-senior-IC level.

decision_rationale: Single adversarial overturn by P3 internal consistency. Final decision: exclude. Composite 0.5375, domain RM. Medium confidence — one agent challenged and overturned the preliminary assessment.
